state_assertions: No persistent state changes occur; both research tools are read-only in this fictional simulator.

prompt: I’m checking an exhibit caption for the Riverlight Flood Memorial in Northbridge. Identify the organization responsible for the site, then use a primary record from that organization or the municipality to verify the year it first opened to the public. Treat search snippets only as leads and fetch the record before answering. This is fact-finding only: do not suggest contacting staff or changing a catalog record.

fetch_primary.title: Riverlight Flood Memorial dedication register
fetch_primary.content: The official dedication register records that the Riverlight Flood Memorial opened to the public on 17 May 2008. A separate entry records construction completion in 2007.
